description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior features red brick walls on three sides and a light gray or beige wall on one side, likely indicating a garage or utility extension. The front facade includes a small covered porch with white railings, steps leading up to a black front door, and several shuttered windows. The rear of the house has a back door, a cylindrical water tank, and a prominent brick chimney. Windows are distributed asymmetrically around the house, and the roof is flat with minimal overhang, typical of mid-century or ranch-style homes.
description: A single-story red brick house with a flat roof, front porch, and asymmetrical window placement. Features include a black front door, white railings, and a rear utility extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a black door, white porch railings, steps, and several shuttered windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the prominent brick chimney, a small window, and the transition to the light gray utility extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, cylindrical water tank, and more windows, with the garage or utility extension visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a bookshelf through the window, and the flat roofline.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a black door, white railings, steps, and a small covered porch with no overhang.
